name: North American DataCom, Inc.
summary: North American DataCom, Inc. provides various data storage, broadband network, and infrastructure services for telecommunications companies, Internet service providers, application service providers, B2B/B2C e-Business providers, and data-centric enterprises. The company offers data storage, data back up and restoration, data mirroring, and Web design and hosting services, as well as co-location facilities, virtual private networks, and dedicated servers. It also provides dial-up and dedicated Internet access, as well as wireless paging services. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Iuka, Mississippi.
